question: Where is the window located in the image? Select from the following options: (A) In the center of the image. (B) On the left side of the image. (C) In the top left corner of the image. (D) On the right side of the image.
gold_answer: On the left side of the image
answer_choices: In the center of the image

On the right side of the image
